/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/sspm-daemon.dir/daemon_main.cpp.o" -o sspm-daemon  ../../libsspm_core.a -lsqlite3 /opt/local/lib/libcurl.dylib /opt/local/libexec/openssl3/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/local/libexec/openssl3/lib/libcrypto.dylib
